title: LLM Quantization Strategy
description: Optimize a heavy 70B parameter open-source foundation model for real-time mobile low-latency runtimes.

steps.title: Initial Model Compression Assessment
steps.scenario: The uncompressed foundation model consumes over 140GB of VRAM, exceeding local edge hardware profiles. Which compression strategy do you execute?

options.text: Implement 4-bit AWQ (Activation-aware Weight Quantization) to shield high-salience activation channels.
options.feedback: Excellent choice. AWQ preserves performance across critical attention steps while cutting memory overhead.

options.text: Deploy uniform scalar INT8 quantization across all layers.
options.feedback: Perplexity spikes dramatically. Outlier features are dropped, causing severe model accuracy degradation.

steps.title: Runtime Memory Bandwidth Triage
steps.scenario: The model sizes fit into local memory, but heavy serialization latency creates an execution bottleneck. How do you resolve this compile-time lag?

options.text: Write a custom fused CUDA kernel wrapper to merge flash-attention optimization steps.
options.feedback: Outstanding engineering choice! Layer fusion reduces high-latency global memory fetches completely.

options.text: Increase core thread distribution counts inside standard orchestration parameters.
options.feedback: Modest speed gains achieved, but execution hits fundamental limitations without explicit hardware layer splits.
